palette.description: Warm amber coffeehouse — exposed brick reds, dark wood browns, cream walls, golden Edison bulb light, sage/olive accents, worn hardwood mid-tones

assets.description: Warm hardwood plank floor tile, medium tone oak, slightly worn grain, pixel art, cozy coffee shop, warm amber lighting, top-down view
assets.notes: Base floor tile — ~180 placements. Use as lower terrain for Wang tileset.

assets.description: Hardwood floor tile variant, slightly darker grain than base, subtle knot marks, pixel art, warm tone, top-down view
assets.notes: Darker variant — ~60 placements. Mix with 01 for natural variation.

assets.description: Worn hardwood floor tile, lighter and scuffed from foot traffic, pixel art, warm aging patina, top-down view
assets.notes: Worn variant — ~20 placements. Concentrated near counter and door.

assets.description: Black rubber anti-fatigue mat, textured surface, small pixel art tile, behind-counter workspace, top-down view
assets.notes: 4 placements behind counter where Gina stands.

assets.description: Welcome doormat, worn brown fiber, slightly frayed edges, pixel art, coffee shop entrance, top-down view
Exposed red-brown brick wall tile, warm tone, old building character, pixel art, coffee shop interior, subtle mortar lines, front-facing view
assets.notes: ~40 tiles. Back wall behind counter. Signature texture.

assets.description: Cream sage painted drywall tile, slightly warm white, subtle texture, pixel art, indie coffee shop side wall, front-facing view
Dark wood wainscoting strip, lower wall panel, rich brown stained wood, pixel art, half-height decorative trim, front-facing view
assets.notes: ~20 tiles. Half-height at bottom of painted walls.

assets.description: Black chalkboard menu board with faint chalk writing, coffee shop menu, hand-drawn drink names, pixel art, front-facing view
assets.notes: 6 tiles. Menu board behind counter. Text baked into art.

assets.description: Wooden window frame, warm brown painted wood, coffee shop front window border, pixel art, front-facing view
Window glass with condensation and warm light glow from outside, blurred sidewalk scene through glass, late afternoon, pixel art
assets.notes: 6 tiles. Interior of window. Impressionistic exterior.

assets.description: Wooden door frame with glass panel door, small PUSH sticker, coffee shop entrance, pixel art, warm brown wood, front-facing view
L-shaped coffee bar counter face, dark stained walnut wood, customer-facing side, pixel art, front-facing view
Coffee bar counter surface from above, dark wood edge with subtle items (napkin stack, card reader), pixel art, top-down view
Behind-counter barista workspace, slightly cluttered with cups pitchers and tools, pixel art, top-down view
Small round cafe table with laptop and half-empty latte on top, light wood, slightly worn, pixel art, top-down view, transparent background
Small round cafe table with open book and full coffee cup, light wood, worn, pixel art, top-down view, transparent background
Small round cafe table, empty, light wood, slightly worn surface, pixel art, top-down view, transparent background
Simple wooden cafe chair, seen from above at slight angle, light wood, pixel art, transparent background
Upholstered cafe chair with olive or rust colored cushion seat, wooden frame, pixel art, top-down view, transparent background
Bar stool at coffee counter, dark wood with simple round seat, pixel art, side/top view, transparent background
Tall wooden bookshelf packed with colorful paperback books, some tilted and dog-eared, pixel art, front-facing view, transparent background
Standing wooden coat rack with one jacket hanging, pixel art, front-facing view, transparent background
assets.notes: Near door. Jacket implies someone is staying.

assets.description: Small booth banquette seat against wall, cracked leather, dark upholstery, pixel art, top-down view, transparent background
Professional chrome and black espresso machine, two group heads, portafilters hanging, heavy and well-used, pixel art, transparent background
Coffee grinder with hopper on top and catch bin below, matte black, pixel art, transparent background
Small dark bin for spent coffee grounds, barista knock box, pixel art, tiny, transparent background
Stainless steel milk steaming pitcher, barista tool, pixel art, tiny, transparent background
assets.notes: Near steam wand. Animated during steaming.

assets.description: Glass display case with muffins and croissants inside, slightly blurred through glass, pixel art, transparent background
Clear glass tip jar with a few bills and coins, small handwritten label, pixel art, tiny, transparent background
Small point-of-sale screen register, faint screen glow, pixel art, tiny, transparent background
Small potted plant on windowsill, slightly drooping leaves, terracotta pot, pixel art, tiny, transparent background
Hanging trailing vine plant from ceiling bracket, green cascading leaves, pixel art, transparent background
Cork bulletin board with overlapping colorful flyers and business cards, concert posters, room for rent notice, pixel art, transparent background
Small OPEN neon sign glowing warm amber, coffee shop window sign, pixel art, transparent background
Small chalkboard with WiFi password written in chalk, pixel art, tiny, transparent background
Power strip with charger plugged in, under table, pixel art, tiny, transparent background
Tiny brass bell above door frame, small and shiny, pixel art, transparent background
Mop and bucket in corner, yellow bucket with mop handle, working coffee shop detail, pixel art, transparent background
Small stack of newspapers and free weekly magazines on table, pixel art, tiny, transparent background
Open laptop computer with faint blue-white screen glow, seen from above, pixel art, transparent background
assets.notes: On player's table. Screen glow disappears when closed.

assets.description: Ceramic latte cup half-empty on a small saucer, warm cream color, pixel art, tiny, transparent background

Young woman barista, mid-20s, hair in messy bun or ponytail, wearing apron over band t-shirt, dark sneakers, slight smile, observant expression, warm indie coffee shop character, 16-bit pixel art, Stardew Valley style
assets.notes: Gina the barista. Knows everything. Behind the counter the entire scene.

assets.description: Young person in hoodie and jeans, slightly rumpled, tired but focused eyes, laptop bag, casual comfortable look, startup founder vibe, 16-bit pixel art, Stardew Valley style
assets.notes: Player character. Hoodie, jeans, tired eyes.

assets.description: Confident young man in blazer over fitted t-shirt, sunglasses pushed up on head, great hair, takes up space, slightly arrogant posture, tech bro energy, 16-bit pixel art, Stardew Valley style
assets.notes: Chad Thunderpitch. The nemesis. Walks like he owns the room.

assets.description: Middle-aged person with glasses in comfortable casual clothes, sitting posture, quiet bookish demeanor, reading a paperback, 16-bit pixel art, Stardew Valley style
assets.notes: Background NPC. Exists to make the room feel real.

assets.description: Close-up face portrait of young startup founder, warm expression, slightly tired eyes, relatable not heroic, 16-bit pixel art, warm amber lighting, dialogue box portrait
assets.notes: Player dialogue portrait. Says 'I'm figuring it out.'

assets.description: Close-up face portrait of confident tech bro, smirk, perfect teeth, slightly hollow eyes behind the confidence, 16-bit pixel art, warm lighting, dialogue box portrait
assets.notes: Chad dialogue portrait. Punchable but also performing.

assets.description: Close-up face portrait of young barista woman, knowing smile, observant eyes, hair pulled back, warm and friendly but sharp, 16-bit pixel art, warm amber lighting, dialogue box portrait
assets.notes: Gina dialogue portrait. She knows everything.
